title: Topic detail view component with metadata, tabs, and action buttons
purpose: Displays comprehensive topic information including metadata, document content across different types, and provides actions like verify, edit, and delete.
module_context: Exports a TopicDetail component that uses React hooks for data fetching and state management, with helper functions for formatting confidence levels and dates.

steps.content: Return CSS class names for a badge based on the confidence tier value.
Map high confidence to green styling.
Map medium confidence to yellow styling.
Map low confidence to red styling.
Return gray styling for unknown confidence levels.
Convert the first character of the confidence tier to uppercase.
Return the capitalized confidence tier string.
If no date is provided, return 'Never'.
Parse the date string into a Date object.
Format the date with year, month, day, hour, and minute.
Initialize state for active document tab and verification status.
Fetch topic data using the useTopic hook.
Render loading state while data is being fetched.
Render error state with retry and back options if data fetch fails.
Render not found state if topic does not exist.
Render the full topic detail view with metadata, tabs, and content viewer.
Handle the verify action by calling the verify function and updating UI state.
Set the verification status to true to indicate ongoing operation.
Call the verify function from the useTopic hook.
Reset the verification status to false after the operation completes.
Retrieve the document content for the currently active tab.
Return the content string or an empty string if no content exists.
